title: Glia-Free Cortical Neuronal Feeding Schedule - Neuronal Morphology
author: Justin T Savage
materials: The following solutions should be prepared: a) 4% PFA in PBS – In a 50ml conical tube add one 16% PFA ampule (10ml), 26ml of ddH2O and 4ml of 10X PBS. Mix and place at 37˚C to warm up. For storing keep away from the light at 4C. b) Blocking and permeabilization solution (0.2% Triton) - This recipe makes 5ml of blocking solution, sufficient for 1 24-well plate. •2.4ml of antibody-blocking buffer •2.5ml of Normal Goat Serum (NGS) •100ul of 10% Triton. c) Primary antibodies solution: This recipe makes for 5ml, sufficient for 1 24-well plate. •4500µl Antibody blocking buffer •500µl Normal Goat Serum (NGS) •5ul of anti-GFP antibody

a) Secondary antibodies solution: This recipe makes for 5ml, sufficient for 1 24-well plate. 4500µl Antibody blocking buffer 500µl Normal Goat Serum (NGS) 5ul of anti-Chicken IgY (H+L) Secondary Antibody, Alexa Fluor 488

steps.title: This recipe makes 20ml of neuronal media
steps.instruction: This recipe makes 20ml of neuronal media. Make fresh per use

steps.title: To a 50ml tube, add the following media components
steps.instruction: To a 50ml tube, add the following media components: %s %s Reagent Volume Neurobasal plus 19ml Pen/strep (100x) 200µl Sodium Pyruvate (100x) 200µl B27 plus (50x) 400µl

steps.title: Sterile filter these components through a syringe filter
steps.instruction: Sterile filter these components through a syringe filter. Place media in the incubator with cap unscrewed. Allow the media to warm and equilibrate for at least 45 minutes. (Media will have an orange color and bubbles)

steps.title: Add growth factors right before the...
steps.instruction: Add growth factors right before the time to use the media. %s %s BDNF 20µl CNTF 20µl Forskolin 20µl

steps.title: Neurons are extremely sensitive to environmental...
steps.instruction: Neurons are extremely sensitive to environmental changes, so only half of the media is replaced.

steps.title: Check neurons for normal morphology under a microscope
steps.instruction: Check neurons for normal morphology under a microscope.

steps.title: Prepare neuronal media with Neurobasal plus...
steps.instruction: Prepare neuronal media with Neurobasal plus + B27 plus according to recipe fresh + add AraC (1:10000). Let equilibrate for at least 45 min in the incubator with the cap unscrewed.

steps.title: Remove 230µl of old neuronal media
steps.instruction: Remove 230µl of old neuronal media.

steps.title: Add 250µl of fresh media
steps.instruction: Add 250µl of fresh media.

steps.title: Store in the incubator
steps.instruction: Store in the incubator

steps.title: Check neurons for normal morphology under a microscope
steps.instruction: Check neurons for normal morphology under a microscope.

steps.title: Prepare neuronal media with Neurobasal plus...
steps.instruction: Prepare neuronal media with Neurobasal plus + B27 plus according to recipe fresh. Let equilibrate for at least 45 min in the incubator with the cap unscrewed.

steps.title: Remove 230µl of old neuronal media
steps.instruction: Remove 230µl of old neuronal media.

steps.title: Add 250µl of fresh media
steps.instruction: Add 250µl of fresh media.

steps.title: Store in the incubator
steps.instruction: Store in the incubator.

steps.title: Check neurons for normal morphology under microscope
steps.instruction: Check neurons for normal morphology under microscope.

steps.title: Prepare Lipofectamine solution (per well)
steps.instruction: Prepare Lipofectamine solution (per well): 100 μl Opti-MEM + 2 μl Lipofectamine. Pipet together and incubate for 00:05:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Prepare DNA-Lipofectamine mixture
steps.instruction: Prepare DNA-Lipofectamine mixture: 100 μl Opti-MEM + 2 μl Lipofectamine + 2 μl of 0.5 μg/μl GFP plasmid. Pipet together and incubate for 00:05:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Add the Lipofectamine solution (prepared in...
steps.instruction: Add the Lipofectamine solution (prepared in go to step #18 ) to the DNA-Lipofectamine mixture (prepared in go to step #19 ), mix and incubate for 00:20:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Remove 300 μl of medium from...
steps.instruction: Remove 300 μl of medium from neurons and save in sterile tube. Add 200 μl of transfection mixture to neurons. Incubate for 02:00:00 at 37 °C .

steps.title: Check neurons for normal morphology under a microscope
steps.instruction: Check neurons for normal morphology under a microscope.

steps.title: Prepare neuronal media with Neurobasal plus...
steps.instruction: Prepare neuronal media with Neurobasal plus + B27 according to recipe fresh. Let equilibrate for at least 45 min in the incubator with the cap unscrewed.

steps.title: Place the NGM on ice to cool down
steps.instruction: Place the NGM on ice to cool down.

steps.title: Add the following to NGM depending on experimental condition
steps.instruction: Add the following to NGM depending on experimental condition: Condition Additive Final concentration 1 ACM ACM 100 ug/ml 2 Spermidine Spermidine 10 nM 3 Control Vehicle equivalent volume

steps.title: Equilibrate and warm up the NGM...
steps.instruction: Equilibrate and warm up the NGM with additive in the incubator ( 37 °C , 10% CO2) before adding it to the cells.

steps.title: Remove 230µl of old neuronal media
steps.instruction: Remove 230µl of old neuronal media.

steps.title: Add 250µl of fresh media
steps.instruction: Add 250µl of fresh media.

steps.title: Store in the incubator
steps.instruction: Store in the incubator.

steps.title: Check neurons for normal morphology under a microscope
steps.instruction: Check neurons for normal morphology under a microscope.

steps.title: Prepare neuronal media with Neurobasal plus...
steps.instruction: Prepare neuronal media with Neurobasal plus + B27 according to recipe fresh. Let equilibrate for at least 45 min in the incubator with the cap unscrewed.

steps.title: Place the NGM on ice to cool down
steps.instruction: Place the NGM on ice to cool down.

steps.title: Add the following to NGM depending on experimental condition
steps.instruction: Add the following to NGM depending on experimental condition: %s %s

steps.title: Equilibrate and warm up the NGM...
steps.instruction: Equilibrate and warm up the NGM with additive in the incubator ( 37 °C , 10% CO2) before adding it to the cells.

steps.title: Remove 230µl of old neuronal media
steps.instruction: Remove 230µl of old neuronal media.

steps.title: Add 250µl of fresh media
steps.instruction: Add 250µl of fresh media.

steps.title: Store in the incubator
steps.instruction: Store in the incubator.

steps.title: In a chemical fume hood, aspirate...
steps.instruction: In a chemical fume hood, aspirate media from cells and immediately add 500µl of warm 4% PFA to each well.

steps.title: Fix the neurons for 7 minutes at room temperature
steps.instruction: Fix the neurons for 7 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Wash 3 times with PBS
steps.instruction: Wash 3 times with PBS.

steps.title: Add 200ul of blocking solution to...
steps.instruction: Add 200ul of blocking solution to each well and block for 30min at room temperature.

steps.title: Remove the blocking solution and add...
steps.instruction: Remove the blocking solution and add 200µl of primary antibody solution to each well. Incubate at 4˚C overnight.

steps.title: Remove the primary antibody and wash 3 times with PBS
steps.instruction: Remove the primary antibody and wash 3 times with PBS

steps.title: Add 200µl of secondary antibody solution...
steps.instruction: Add 200µl of secondary antibody solution to each well and incubate at room temperature for 3h, keeping it protected from light.

steps.title: Wash 3 times with PBS
steps.instruction: Wash 3 times with PBS.

steps.title: Mount coverslips onto slides using one...
steps.instruction: Mount coverslips onto slides using one small drop of VECTASHIELD Antifade Mounting Medium with DAPI.

steps.title: Seal with nail polish and dry...
steps.instruction: Seal with nail polish and dry at room temp for at least 30min before storing at 4˚C.

steps.title: Transfect neurons with GFP plasmid, using Lipofectamine 2000
steps.instruction: Transfect neurons with GFP plasmid, using Lipofectamine 2000.

steps.title: Remove all medium from neurons
steps.instruction: Remove all medium from neurons. Add 50% saved medium and 50% new medium. Return neurons to incubator.

steps.title: Acquire images using a fluorescence microscope (e
steps.instruction: Acquire images using a fluorescence microscope (e.g. Keyence BZ-X800) at 20x magnification.

steps.title: Manually analyze dendrite length using the...
steps.instruction: Manually analyze dendrite length using the NeuronJ plugin within the FIJI software.
